Package kafe

Class BaseDescribe<I,S,R>

java.lang.Object
kafe.BaseSetup<I,S,R>
kafe.BaseDescribe<I,S,R>
public abstract class BaseDescribe<I,S,R> extends BaseSetup<I,S,R>
BaseDescribe extends BaseSetup for Describe-It pattern. Describe can be nested, and Its can mix mutations and assertions.
